label: 圆管
description: 沿 3D 路径生成圆管。path 为扁平点列；可用 spline=catmull_rom/bezier 生成光滑曲线管。何时用：管路/线束/弯折杆件/框架圆管，比一段段圆柱拼接更连续真实。⚠️ 本 op 直接产出三角网格(mesh)，不能作为布尔运算(g_union/g_difference/g_intersection)的输入——布尔仅支持实体(solid) shape。
description-en: Create a round pipe along a 3D path, optionally smoothing it with Catmull-Rom or Bezier splines. Use when: tubing/wiring/bent rods/tubular frames — more continuous and realistic than chaining cylinders. WARNING: this op emits a triangle MESH and CANNOT be fed into boolean ops (g_union/g_difference/g_intersection), which only accept solid shapes.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（圆管不引用其它 shape，直接由 path 生成）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; the pipe is built from `path` and references no other shape.

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: 路径点
inputs.description: 扁平 3D 点列 [x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2,...]，至少两点
inputs.description-en: Flat 3D point list [x1,y1,z1,x2,y2,z2,...], at least two points.

inputs.name: spline
inputs.label: 样条
inputs.description-en: polyline, catmull_rom, or bezier path interpolation.

inputs.name: samples_per_segment
inputs.label: 每段采样
inputs.description: 样条每段的采样数（越大越光滑）

inputs.name: radial_segments
inputs.label: 圆截面段数
inputs.description: 圆截面的分段数（越大越圆）
inputs.description-en: Number of radial segments around the tube (higher = rounder).

inputs.name: closed
inputs.label: 闭合路径
inputs.description-en: true = close the path into a loop.

inputs.name: up_hint
inputs.label: 上方向提示
inputs.description: 构造管道截面朝向的 3D 向量 [x,y,z]
inputs.description-en: 3D up vector [x,y,z] used to orient the tube section.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 pipe{n}

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行 shape 的 id（供下游引用）；path/半径错误时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the new shape (for downstream refs). Empty string when the path/radius was invalid.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: path 不合法或 radius 非正数时的原因；非空表示未追加任何几何，批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取
outputs.description-en: Reason when path is invalid or radius is non-positive. Non-empty means nothing was appended even though the batch may report ok — always read it.
